topic: perfumed detergent residues in wine glasses
trigger_keywords: preservar la calidad de los vinos finos en servicio
limpiar las copas con detergentes perfumados

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Wine glasses retain scented detergent or rinse-aid residue.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The residue contributes foreign aromas and may affect the glass surface and mousse.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine's own aroma and flavour are masked or distorted during service.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine's own aroma and flavour are masked or distorted during service.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
